## Verses (7)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The sound of my cry went up to the Lord; with my voice I made my prayer for grace to the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | I put all my sorrows before him; and made clear to him all my trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | When my spirit is overcome, your eyes are on my goings; nets have been secretly placed in the way in which I go. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Looking to my right side, I saw no man who was my friend: I had no safe place; no one had any care for my soul. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | I have made my cry to you, O Lord; I have said, You are my safe place, and my heritage in the land of the living. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Give ear to my cry, for I am made very low: take me out of the hands of my haters, for they are stronger than I. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Take my soul out of prison, so that I may give praise to your name: the upright will give praise because of me; for you have given me a full reward. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
